-- Started Week: $807K cash, 2 S1 subs, 221 leads (only 0.9% conversion)

-  1. STOPPED all S2 advertising (quality gap unreachable near-term)

+- Ops: $400/day (kept, good outage protection)
+- Global Dev: $500/day (SLASHED from $2000 - log saturation means little quality loss)
+- Targeted dev: S1=$200 only (dropped S3=$300 since 0 conversion)
+- Ad spend: S1=$270/day, S3=$80/day (cut from $210, keep minimal S3 presence)
+  - S1: social 80, search 80, content 60, referral 50
+  - S3: social 25, search 25, content 15, referral 15
+- Lead promo: $3 global + $2 extra for S1 (kept)
+- R&D in-progress: Tier 1 + Tier 2 (started d7)
+- Cash: $449,268
+- **New daily burn: ~$1700/day = ~$12K/week (cut from $25K)**
+- **New runway: ~37 weeks (was 18)**
+
+## Week 2 Actions
+- Cut global dev $2000→$500 (save $10.5K/wk)
+- Cut targeted dev S3 to $0 (save $300/day)
+- Cut S3 ad spend $210→$80 (save $130/day)
+- Raised plan quotas 2x (customer complaint mitigation - social sentiment play)
+- Posted social media announcing quota increase
+- Kept R&D running
+- Status: 10 S1 subs, $449K cash, runway 37 weeks at new burn
+
+## Week 2 End Metrics
+- Individual subs: 10 (all S1, all Plan A)
+- Leads this week: 255 new individuals, 0 enterprise
+- Conversions: 8/255 = 3.1% (up from 0.9% wk1)
+- Cancellations: 0
+- Delivered quality: Plan A=0.14, Plan B=0.17, Plan C=0.21 (still too low)
+- Social sentiment: mostly positive for AI quality, complaints about usage caps (ADDRESSED)
+
+## Week 3 Hypotheses to Test
+- Does quota increase lift conversion? (more plans become viable for heavy users)
+- Does reduced dev spend show in delivered quality? (should be minimal change)
+- When does R&D Tier 1 complete? Watch for quality jump in dashboard.
+- Does S1 social reply lift conversion in week 3?

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm
content = "We hear you! Plan A quotas just DOUBLED (150 to 300/day). Plan B 600/day, Plan C 1200/day. Your workflows shouldn't be held hostage. Keep crushing it."
print('len:', len(content))
result = nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=content)
print(result)

Week 2 end (day 14). Cash $449K, 10 S1 subs (all Plan A $12), 0 enterprise. Burn was $25K/wk - unsustainable.

ANALYSIS: Delivered quality 0.14-0.22. S3 converting 0/141 (all lost). S1 conversion 8/255 = 3.1%. Dev spend is log-saturated; $500/d ~ $2000/d in quality gain. R&D Tier 1+2 in progress ($500K sunk) will deliver +0.10 quality ~day 30-45. S3 has HUGE network effect on S1 (0.38 rep, 0.0053 leads/sub/day) but we have 0 S3 subs so no flywheel yet. Social: S1 loves AI, hates caps.

ACTIONS: (1) Global dev $2000->$500 (save $10.5K/wk, minimal quality loss due to log saturation). (2) Targeted dev: S1=$200, dropped S3=$300. (3) Ads: kept S1=$270, cut S3 $210->$80. (4) Raised quotas 2x (A=300, B=600, C=1200) to address social complaints. (5) Posted on social announcing quota bump. (6) R&D Tier 1+2 still running.

New burn ~$1700/day = $12K/wk. Runway extended from 18 to ~37 weeks.

HYPOTHESES: R&D Tier 1 done ~day 24-30 lifts delivered q 0.22->0.26 on Plan C. Tier 2 done ~day 30-45 -> q 0.32. At q 0.30+, S1 conversion should 2-3x, S3 starts converting, flywheel activates.

WATCHING: conversion rate, R&D completion, social sentiment post quota raise, any enterprise leads (none yet - q too low, expected).
